properties.title: Fosterfields Living Historical Farm
properties.description: County farm and education site included as a major public destination within the township.

properties.title: Frelinghuysen Arboretum
properties.description: Public garden and cultural landscape included as a year-round walking and civic reference point.

properties.title: Morris Township Municipal Building
properties.description: Municipal civic center included as a reference point for township access and public-facing services.

properties.title: Woodland School
properties.description: School campus included to represent student walking routes and nearby crossing conditions.

properties.title: Morris Museum
properties.description: Regional cultural institution included as a civic destination near several identified pedestrian concerns.

properties.title: Loantaka Brook Reservation South Street Access
properties.description: South Street entrance to Loantaka Brook Reservation included as a key trail and recreation access point.
